# Project Context
<!-- GENERATED by reflect — do not edit, regenerate with: reflect context -->
<!-- Last updated: 2026-04-04 12:24 | 12 sessions analyzed -->

## Key Decisions & Rationale

- **Format.yaml + subagent architecture** — Replacing executable harness with declarative format.yaml and Claude synthesis to decouple context generation from script maintenance. Chosen 2026-04-04 as core infrastructure pivot. (checkpoint 90e2641946db)
- **Zero-storage, read-on-demand design** — Fetch evidence from Entire/git at synthesis time to avoid staleness and sync problems, accepting latency/cost tradeoff. Enables freshness without background sync. (checkpoint 90e2641946db)
- **Skill descriptions from user intent** — Lead with what users are *trying to do* ("Why did we make this decision?") rather than implementation ("Run /reflect to invoke the harness"). Broadens natural-language trigger surface. (checkpoint 4a6b59147ec9)
- **SessionStart auto-refresh via .last_run state** — Track freshness per-repo and refresh context on session start without manual user action. Requires careful trigger threading through hook → SKILL → agent instructions. (checkpoint 90e2641946db)
- **Replaceable harness architecture** — Design harness interface as swappable script so format.yaml can invoke any language (Python, bash, Ruby). Sound architectural choice enabling future alternatives. (commit 46c8781)
- **Benchmark on self-repo only** — Evaluate reflect using its own rich Entire session history, acknowledging results are ungeneralizable to sparse-history repos. (checkpoint 90e2641946db)

## Gotchas & Friction

- **Dual SKILL.md copy sync is unautomated** — skill/SKILL.md (source) and .claude/skills/reflect/SKILL.md (installed) must be manually kept in sync. No enforcement or warning when they diverge. File move in 7d0959c created confusion about whether SKILL.md was deleted. (checkpoint 4a6b59147ec9)
- **Entire CLI is a hard, undocumented dependency** — reflect's real-world value is near-zero without it, but README does not adequately warn users. Limits applicability to users with Entire installed. (checkpoint 90e2641946db)
- **Many context.md entries are truncated, vague, or stale** — Signal filtering for "hard-to-derive" facts is aspirational rather than reliable. Results in low-confidence briefings. (checkpoint 90e2641946db)
- **Checker agent silent CLI errors** — '[CLI error: unknown]' with no content halts diagnosis. All ground-truth signals missed, resulting in default parse-failure scores (2,2,2,2). (checkpoint ed2a5817517f)
- **Checker.py lacks markdown fence stripping** — Model returns JSON wrapped in ```json...``` blocks; parser fails to strip before json.decode(). CHECKER_SYSTEM_PROMPT likely misconfigured. (checkpoint ed2a5817517f)
- **Agent budget exhaustion blocks multi-file tasks** — $0.30 cap hit mid-session after 5 turns reading large codebase; no code written. Budget insufficient for diagnostic work before edits. (checkpoint 51d747190c00)

## Open Work

- **Fix symlink path resolution in reflect entry point** — Replace os.path.abspath(__file__) with os.path.realpath(__file__) so lib/ imports resolve when running via ~/.local/bin symlink. (checkpoint 51d747190c00)
- **Fix lib/context.py harness invocation for non-Python scripts** — Check os.access(harness, os.X_OK) to distinguish executable bash/ruby scripts from Python. Use sys.executable only for non-executable Python harness. (checkpoint 51d747190c00)
- **Strip markdown fences in checker.py JSON parsing** — Add explicit stripping of ```json...``` blocks before json.loads() to handle models that wrap structured output in code fences. (checkpoint ed2a5817517f)
- **Decouple reflect from Entire CLI** — Add support for git history, PR descriptions, issue trackers, and native Claude Code session logs. Require Entire only as optional source. (checkpoint 90e2641946db)
- **Expand benchmark beyond 2 self-tasks** — Test on external repos with sparse or no Entire session history to validate generalizability. Current 100% win rate is unreliable. (checkpoint 90e2641946db)
